name: Central Sector Scholarship Scheme
description: Government scholarship program that provides financial assistance to meritorious students from low-income families to pursue higher education.
eligibility: Students scoring above 80% in Class 12 with family income below ₹8 lakh.
benefits: ₹10,000 per year for undergraduate studies and ₹20,000 per year for postgraduate studies.

name: Ayushman Bharat
description: Health insurance scheme providing financial protection for medical treatment.
eligibility: Families identified in the Socio-Economic Caste Census database.
benefits: Health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.
